title: ferray-stats: no partition/argpartition (partial sort)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy provides np.partition(arr, kth) and np.argpartition(arr, kth) which do a partial sort — O(n) selection of the k-th smallest element. These are faster than full sort when you only need the top-k or median. ferray-stats has no equivalent. Rust's slice::select_nth_unstable provides the primitive.
